implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for RollCall: The system must support multiple classes and semesters, and maintain historical attendance data
The system shall ensure efficiency (throughput stability): The system must generate attendance reports for administrators and calculate attendance percentages
The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): Students must be able to view their own attendance records, ensuring transparency in their academic tracking.
The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
